description_long: This object consists of two thick, dark-colored hardcover books stacked together and secured by a wide, light gray strap running vertically across their center. The covers are glossy and reflect light, giving them a sleek appearance. Bold, hand-painted red text is scrawled across the top book's cover, standing out against the dark background. The edges of the pages are visible and appear tightly bound, with the books' spines showing subtle ridges and no visible text or decoration. The overall form is rectangular and compact, with the strap adding a modern, utilitarian touch. There are no visible illustrations or publisher logos on the covers or spines.
description: A pair of glossy, dark hardcover books bound together by a wide gray strap, featuring bold red hand-painted text on the cover.
description_view_0: The books are seen from the side, showing the page edges and the red text partially visible through the glossy cover, with the strap running vertically.
description_view_1: The top view highlights the full extent of the red hand-painted text and the wide gray strap bisecting the covers.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the page edges and the continuation of the red text, with the strap still prominent.
description_view_3: The back view shows the plain, glossy covers and the strap, with no visible text or decoration.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are dark and glossy with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements. The spines appear plain and unadorned.
